sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 58

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 58:1
items.html:
(to the question) Yod Nekudot [ten points]
The Masach and the Aviut, which cause the striking of the Light in them, are called Nekudot [points] — that is, only before they come into the secret of the Zivug. And since they are fit to raise Ohr Hozer [reflected Light] and to extend a level of ten Sefirot, they are called Yod [ten] Nekudot. (p. 772, Item 61)
